title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
